characters.description: A powerful void human and defender of Savannah. His bond with Silvi and responsibility for a large household shape both his personal plans and his response to threats against his adopted home.
characters.name: Derek

characters.description: Derek's bonded void companion, an accomplished fighter and an increasingly exceptional cook. She travels with him and is a capable member of the Savannah household in her own right. Her magic and practical judgment regularly complement Derek's abilities.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: A powerful returning ally within Derek's circle.
characters.name: Alana

characters.description: An elite defender and guardian within Derek’s circle.
characters.name: Avery

characters.description: A Cydarian noble, formidable lightning fighter, and returning ally.
characters.name: Edgar

characters.description: An ancient sand wielder and guardian who continues travelling far beyond Cydaria.
characters.name: Marrick

characters.description: The king of Indaria and a returning political ally.
characters.name: Ossian

characters.description: A returning Savannah leader and organizer who takes threats to the city seriously.
characters.name: Natalie

characters.description: The manager of the Void Emporium and an organizer within Derek's Savannah household.
characters.name: Malorie

characters.description: A smith and inventive craft worker within Derek's household.
characters.name: Brandy

characters.description: A guard within Derek's household.
characters.name: Jax

characters.description: A young academy adventurer under Derek's protection.
characters.name: Thomas

characters.description: Avery's companion, who helps decide how to care for Alana's former wyvern after its contract ends.
characters.name: Lyra

characters.description: A contract specialist establishing a Savannah shop for standard, specialized, and beast contracts.
characters.name: Rudy

characters.description: A former Assassin's Guild vice leader who now protects Cydaria's royal family and performs intelligence work. Still constrained by competing oaths, she guides Derek into the Guild's concealed headquarters.
characters.name: Vanessa

characters.description: The Assassin’s Guild leader responsible for its Cydarian branch. He threatens Derek’s friends during negotiations and holds the oaths binding Vanessa to the Guild.
characters.name: Cydarian branch leader

characters.description: The Assassin's Guild information master and leader of its Indarian branch. He orders the Guild to meet Derek's demands after Derek shows that its hidden headquarters is within his reach.
characters.name: Indarian branch leader

characters.description: The dwarven leader of the Assassin's Guild branch in Valum. He refuses to move against Derek, values Roman's brewing, and favors protecting useful allies over provoking a fight he considers unwise. He carries a warhammer.
characters.name: Braxton

characters.description: A member of Derek's Savannah household who assists Malorie and helps protect Brandy. Fear of Assassin's Guild retaliation has kept him from regular dungeon work.
characters.name: Bones

characters.description: A member of Derek's Savannah household for whom a large residence is being prepared. Fear of Assassin's Guild retaliation has limited his dungeon activity.
characters.name: Ogre

characters.description: Derek's business associate and the maker of a potent brew valued by Braxton. Assassin's Guild leaders decide that protecting him is preferable to provoking Derek.
characters.name: Roman

characters.description: Jax's wind-using partner, who is expecting a child as the household prepares for the birth.
characters.name: Raina

characters.description: The newborn son of Jax and Raina, and Stacy’s twin. His parents name him after Derek’s surname.
characters.name: Hunter

characters.description: The newborn daughter of Jax and Raina, and Hunter’s twin. Derek chooses her name in memory of his deceased younger sister.
characters.name: Stacy

characters.description: A person whom Braxton authorizes to receive enough information to prepare for an undisclosed threat.
characters.name: Nix

characters.description: A former Earth acquaintance whom Derek locates after returning to his original world.
characters.name: Silvi Jacobs

characters.description: A Universal System watcher who detects two unprecedented unknown-creature alerts on Earth. Both signals vanish within an hour, and the paired warnings do not match any pattern he has previously encountered.
characters.name: Darwin

characters.description: A person known to Derek whose exceptionally strong aura is far from Earth when Derek senses it.
characters.name: Jace

characters.description: Silvi Jacobs's longtime loyal ally and the tank on her rebuilt Earth dungeon team.
characters.name: Gerard

characters.description: A powerful red-skinned human connected to Universal System administration. He comes to Charlotte after escalating alerts and immediately recognizes that Derek does not belong to Earth's system. His earlier questions about Derek show that this encounter follows a long investigation.
characters.name: Kelvin

characters.description: A system-protected task-force leader under Kelvin whose history with Derek and Kelvin is openly hostile.
characters.name: Jace Whitaker

characters.description: A Universal System fighter whose nullification abilities are identified as a possible counter to Derek. At this point, her precise limits and prospective role remain unknown. Kelvin considers her important enough to include when estimating the force required against Derek.
characters.name: Trisha

characters.description: A powerful, near-giant member of the invading council. She supports the coming operation while questioning the damage caused by keeping top fighters away from worlds already under strain. Her concerns are practical, but she remains committed to the invasion.
characters.name: Amelia

characters.description: The unnamed elven ruler of Lenderas and one of the defenders chosen for the invasion. She accepts guardianship as the defending roster takes shape.
characters.name: The Queen

characters.description: A named wyvern sent to reinforce Eloria with Edgar and Vanessa.
characters.name: Blitz

characters.description: One of the twin assassins selected to defend Virindal. She and Vendra accept guardianship together and view the conflict as a chance to fight without their normal restraints.
characters.name: Arya

characters.description: One of the twin assassins chosen as guardians of Virindal. She accepts the role alongside Arya, and both welcome the chance to fight without their usual constraints.
characters.name: Vendra

characters.description: An invading champion identified by another champion as an exceptionally strong defensive combatant. His exact capabilities have not yet been observed by the defenders. Even this limited warning marks him as a likely obstacle in any direct assault on the champion force.
characters.name: Kuthos

characters.description: A four-armed centaur champion who attacks with four axes and relies on strength and defense. Derek incapacitates him, after which he accepts removal from the invasion rather than death.
characters.name: The Indomitable

characters.description: A command figure directing an invading force after its arrival. He works to regroup scattered champions and intends to turn the conquered stronghold into their operational headquarters. Limited local communications complicate his effort to assemble the invasion's strongest fighters.
characters.name: Darvin

characters.description: An invading organizer responsible for communication boosters, teleportation-assisted scouting, and a recall station intended to reunite the champion force.
characters.name: Holcomb

characters.description: The ruler of Lenderas, now identified as the guardian previously designated the Queen. She survives defeat by Amelia but is removed from the invasion.
characters.name: Queen Serta

characters.description: A feline-featured invading champion who can disappear quickly. Derek has no workable way to locate her.
characters.name: Silent Knight

characters.description: An invading champion reported to look almost human, transform into a beast, and possess great strength. Derek travels to northwest Indaria to search for him.
characters.name: Jackis

characters.description: The third-ranked member of the invading champion list and leader of his people. He reaches Eloria alone and offers its guardians a formal, nonlethal duel instead of leading an army assault. His challenge places personal combat ahead of the wider siege.
characters.name: Third-ranked champion

characters.description: The cat-like assassin who attacks Avery in Savannah and is stopped by Braxton.
characters.name: Silent Night

characters.description: A light-based fighter defending Ashgard alongside Marrick. He confronts Jace when the unaffiliated invader attacks the stronghold's guards.
characters.name: David Brandt

characters.description: A sapient lizard champion who tried to compel Jace to return to the invading force. Jace confirms that he killed Rhi during their confrontation. The death helps Derek understand both Jace's recent movements and the unexplained loss on the invasion status display.
characters.name: Rhi

characters.description: An assassin among the remaining invading champions. Jace includes her in his briefing on the force gathering at the captured stronghold.
characters.name: Bria

characters.description: David's granddaughter and a highly capable light user. Her ability to disguise and conceal herself makes her the preferred scout for Derek's planned counterattack. She accepts a mission that requires approaching the captured stronghold without revealing the alliance's preparations.
characters.name: Ashley

characters.description: A duke and barrier specialist recruited for the assault on the gathered champions. He can disrupt communications and, with greater effort, interfere with teleportation. Derek selects him to isolate the enemy command while leaving void travel available to the attackers.
characters.name: Riven

characters.description: An invading champion who commands insect monsters and can summon large beetle swarms. During the battle at Virindal, the commander tears apart nearby structures to reshape the battlefield.
characters.name: Insect commander

characters.description: A returning elf who gives Derek guidance about advancement and the systems, while keeping some information to himself.
characters.name: Dave

characters.description: A craft worker whose help Derek seeks while arranging improved equipment for likely defenders.
characters.name: Tyron

characters.description: Braxton's partner of roughly five decades.
characters.name: Gretchen

characters.description: A member of Alana's circle who remains connected to her resources and joins Derek's household for a special meal.
characters.name: Stella

characters.description: Jace's squad blacksmith, responsible for repairing his damaged kukri and armor.
characters.name: Roderick

characters.description: The king of Valum and Braxton's younger half-brother. He arranges contracts for legendary armor in exchange for materials and compensation from Derek.
characters.name: Darius

characters.description: The master armorsmith directing work on legendary equipment for Derek's allies.
characters.name: Seamus

characters.description: A prominent dwarf responsible for crafting Derek's new armor.
characters.name: Seamus Ironhide

characters.description: An Assassin's Guild operative who joins Eloria's defense from atop Blitz.
characters.name: Mara

characters.description: The king of Cydaria. He releases Vanessa from most of her obligations to the kingdom and offers her a new position as his advisor and head of information gathering.
characters.name: Edward

characters.description: One of Braxton’s leaders in training, assigned to watch the condemned subject of a wyvern-brew experiment.
characters.name: Jared
